title: centaurea tartesiana
intro: Centaurea tartesiana, also known as Tartesian cornflower, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant and hepatoprotective effects, which can help protect the liver and reduce oxidative stress. Centaurea tartesiana is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
